top_signals.title: US-Iran Attacks Escalation Chokes Hormuz Shipping
top_signals.summary: Just three commodity vessels crossed the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, the fewest daily transits since May, shipping data showed, with most ships halting or making U-turns after recent Iranian attacks on vessels and the resumption of a U.S.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iran says civilian infrastructure hit by latest U.S. strikes, expands attacks to Syria, Bahrain

top_signals.title: SoftBank sinks over 9% as Asia chip stocks track Wall Street AI sell-off
top_signals.summary: The declines followed another weak session for U.S. technology stocks, with the Nasdaq Composite falling 1.47% as semiconductor shares came under renewed pressure.

top_signals.title: The British Virgin Islands are a top crypto hub no one ever talks about: Here’s why
top_signals.summary: Kraken, Bitstamp, 1inch and Bitfinex have all set up shop in the British Virgin Islands — but you might find it tricky to book an on-site meeting with one of their executives.
